1:42 it is crazyyyyy. The keeper literally narrows his right side to prepare for Messi's trademark curler. Most elite keepers wouldn't do that because the near post is usually the bigger threat, but with Messi that curl is so inevitable that he still got beaten without even having a chance. if he shot it to the keepers left side that would have been even more easier for Messi. what is the keeper supposed to do? start on the corner lol. these guys precision is a nightmare to keepers.
